title: Links / Tools
summary: links/tools.md is preserved as a raw protocol document in the XanaNode Protocol substrate.
content:
# Tools

Potential tool categories for XanaNode:

- schema validators
- index builders
- merge validators
- namespace resolvers
- duplicate detectors
- relationship suggesters
- substrate importers/exporters
- repository validator: `tools/validate.py`

This repository may link to tools here rather than include every implementation directly.
